commands_run: ls -la data/review_notes && find data/canonical -maxdepth 2 -type f | sort
jq route/corridor TSV summaries into /tmp/routes135.tsv and /tmp/corridors135.tsv (read-only)
jq inspection of data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
bun -e read-only corridor duplicate grouping over data/canonical/corridors.jsonl
bun -e read-only selected pair check against merges.json and do-not-merge.json
commands_not_run: no provider-backed commands or agent harness commands
no canonicalize*, campaign dedup, identity-review, write, ask, schema, ontology-normalize, or --profile/provider commands
no edits to canonical JSONL, wiki pages, DB, LOG.md, manifest, retired submissions, submissions, or merges.json
